defs: In literature and the fine arts, a salient feature or element of a composition or work; esp., the theme, or central or dominant feature;
quotes: This motif, of old things lost, is a favorite one for the serious ballade.
The design . . . is . . . based on the peacock -- a motif favored by decorative artists of all ages.

defs: A decorative appliqu design or figure, as of lace or velvet, used in trimming; also, a repeated design.
